
[38;5;231m●[39m [1m4단계:[0m [1mThreadingConfiguration[0m [1m인터페이스[0m [1m생성[0m

[38;5;75m●[39m [1mWrite[0m(src/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/ThreadingConfiguration.java)
  ⎿  Wrote [1m40[0m lines to [1msrc/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/ThreadingConfiguration.java[0m
     [32m//[39m [32mCopyright[39m [32m(c)[39m [32m2025,[39m [32mthe[39m [32mR8[39m [32mproject[39m [32mauthors.[39m [32mPlease[39m [32msee[39m [32mthe[39m [32mAUTHORS[39m [32mfile[39m
     [32m//[39m [32mfor[39m [32mdetails.[39m [32mAll[39m [32mrights[39m [32mreserved.[39m [32mUse[39m [32mof[39m [32mthis[39m [32msource[39m [32mcode[39m [32mis[39m [32mgoverned[39m [32mby[39m [32ma[39m
     [32m//[39m [32mBSD-style[39m [32mlicense[39m [32mthat[39m [32mcan[39m [32mbe[39m [32mfound[39m [32min[39m [32mthe[39m [32mLICENSE[39m [32mfile.[39m
     [34mpackage[39m com.android.tools.r8.config;

     [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.threading.ThreadingModule;
     [34mimport[39m java.util.concurrent.ExecutorService;

     [32m/**[39m
     [32m *[39m [32mConfiguration[39m [32minterface[39m [32mfor[39m [32mthreading[39m [32msettings.[39m
     [38;5;246m…[39m [38;5;246m+30[39m [38;5;246mlines[39m [38;5;246m(ctrl+o[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mexpand)[39m

[38;5;231m●[39m [1m5단계:[0m [1mApiLevelConfiguration[0m [1m인터페이스[0m [1m생성[0m

[38;5;75m●[39m [1mWrite[0m(src/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/ApiLevelConfiguration.java)
  ⎿  Wrote [1m49[0m lines to [1msrc/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/ApiLevelConfiguration.java[0m
     [32m//[39m [32mCopyright[39m [32m(c)[39m [32m2025,[39m [32mthe[39m [32mR8[39m [32mproject[39m [32mauthors.[39m [32mPlease[39m [32msee[39m [32mthe[39m [32mAUTHORS[39m [32mfile[39m
     [32m//[39m [32mfor[39m [32mdetails.[39m [32mAll[39m [32mrights[39m [32mreserved.[39m [32mUse[39m [32mof[39m [32mthis[39m [32msource[39m [32mcode[39m [32mis[39m [32mgoverned[39m [32mby[39m [32ma[39m
     [32m//[39m [32mBSD-style[39m [32mlicense[39m [32mthat[39m [32mcan[39m [32mbe[39m [32mfound[39m [32min[39m [32mthe[39m [32mLICENSE[39m [32mfile.[39m
     [34mpackage[39m com.android.tools.r8.config;

     [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.utils.AndroidApiLevel;

     [32m/**[39m
     [32m *[39m [32mConfiguration[39m [32minterface[39m [32mfor[39m [32mAndroid[39m [32mAPI[39m [32mlevel[39m [32msettings.[39m
     [32m *[39m [32mThis[39m [32mfollows[39m [32mSingle[39m [32mResponsibility[39m [32mPrinciple[39m [32m(SRP)[39m [32mby[39m [32mfocusing[39m
     [38;5;246m…[39m [38;5;246m+39[39m [38;5;246mlines[39m [38;5;246m(ctrl+o[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mexpand)[39m

[38;5;231m●[39m [1m6단계:[0m [1mConsumerConfiguration[0m [1m인터페이스[0m [1m생성[0m

[38;5;75m●[39m [1mWrite[0m(src/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/ConsumerConfiguration.java)
  ⎿  Wrote [1m86[0m lines to [1msrc/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/ConsumerConfiguration.java[0m
     [32m//[39m [32mCopyright[39m [32m(c)[39m [32m2025,[39m [32mthe[39m [32mR8[39m [32mproject[39m [32mauthors.[39m [32mPlease[39m [32msee[39m [32mthe[39m [32mAUTHORS[39m [32mfile[39m
     [32m//[39m [32mfor[39m [32mdetails.[39m [32mAll[39m [32mrights[39m [32mreserved.[39m [32mUse[39m [32mof[39m [32mthis[39m [32msource[39m [32mcode[39m [32mis[39m [32mgoverned[39m [32mby[39m [32ma[39m
     [32m//[39m [32mBSD-style[39m [32mlicense[39m [32mthat[39m [32mcan[39m [32mbe[39m [32mfound[39m [32min[39m [32mthe[39m [32mLICENSE[39m [32mfile.[39m
     [34mpackage[39m com.android.tools.r8.config;

     [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.AndroidResourceConsumer;
     [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.AndroidResourceProvider;
     [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.ClassFileConsumer;
     [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.DataResourceConsumer;
     [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.DesugarGraphConsumer;
     [38;5;246m…[39m [38;5;246m+76[39m [38;5;246mlines[39m [38;5;246m(ctrl+o[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mexpand)[39m

[38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231m진행률을 점검하고 미진한 부분, 누락된 작업, 남은 리스크를 리스트업한 뒤 우선순위 높은 것부터 진행해보자. [39m[49m

[38;5;231m●[39m [1m7단계:[0m [1m통합[0m [1mCompilerConfiguration[0m [1m인터페이스[0m [1m생성[0m

[38;5;75m●[39m [1mWrite[0m(src/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/CompilerConfiguration.java)
  ⎿  Wrote [1m92[0m lines to [1msrc/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/CompilerConfiguration.java[0m
     [32m// Copyright (c) 2025, the R8 project authors. Please see the AUTHORS file[39m
     [32m// for details. All rights reserved. Use of this source code is governed by a[39m
     [32m// BSD-style license that can be found in the LICENSE file.[39m
     [34mpackage[39m com.android.tools.r8.config;

     [32m/**[39m
     [32m * Unified configuration interface combining all compiler configuration aspects.[39m
     [32m *[39m [32mThis[39m [32mfollows[39m [32mInterface[39m [32mSegregation[39m [32mPrinciple[39m [32m(ISP)[39m [32mand[39m [32mComposite[39m [32mPattern[39m
     [32m *[39m [32mto[39m [32mprovide[39m [32ma[39m [32munified[39m [32mview[39m [32mwhile[39m [32mallowing[39m [32mindividual[39m [32mconfiguration[39m [32maccess.[39m
     [32m *[39m
     [38;5;246m…[39m [38;5;246m+82[39m [38;5;246mlines[39m [38;5;246m(ctrl+o[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mexpand)[39m

[38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231m1 [39m[49m

[38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231ms/w architect 관점에서 현재 구조를 분석하고 결합도, 책임 분리, 확장성, 테스트 용이성 측면 개선 포인트를 찾아 적용하자. [39m[49m

  [1m[38;5;246m1[0m[38;5;246m tasks ([1m0[0m[38;5;246m done, [1m1[0m[38;5;246m in progress, [1m0[0m[38;5;246m open)[39m
  [38;5;215m◼ [1m[39mInternalOptions 분리 설계[0m

[38;5;153m──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
[39m [1m[38;5;153mCreate file[0m
 [38;5;246msrc/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/package-info.java[39m
[2m[38;5;239m╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
[0m [32m// Copyright (c) 2025, the R8 project authors. Please see the AUTHORS file[39m
 [32m// for details. All rights reserved. Use of this source code is governed by a[39m
 [32m// BSD-style license that can be found in the LICENSE file.[39m

 [32m/**[39m
 [32m *[39m [32mConfiguration[39m [32minterfaces[39m [32mfor[39m [32mR8/D8[39m [32mcompiler.[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m<h2>Architecture[39m [32mOverview</h2>[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m<p>This[39m [32mpackage[39m [32mprovides[39m [32ma[39m [32mset[39m [32mof[39m [32minterfaces[39m [32mthat[39m [32mfollow[39m [32mSOLID[39m [32mprinciples[39m [32mto[39m [32mimprove[39m
 [32m *[39m [32mthe[39m [32marchitecture[39m [32mof[39m [32mR8/D8[39m [32mconfiguration[39m [32mmanagement:[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m<h3>SOLID[39m [32mPrinciples[39m [32mApplied</h3>[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m<dl>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<dt><b>Single[39m [32mResponsibility[39m [32mPrinciple[39m [32m(SRP)</b></dt>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<dd>Each[39m [32minterface[39m [32mhas[39m [32mone[39m [32mreason[39m [32mto[39m [32mchange:[39m
 [32m *[39m     [32m<ul>[39m
 [32m *[39m       [32m<li>{@link[39m [32mCompilationConfiguration}[39m [32m-[39m [32mcompilation[39m [32mmode[39m [32mand[39m [32moutput[39m [32msettings</li>[39m
 [32m *[39m       [32m<li>{@link[39m [32mOptimizationConfiguration}[39m [32m-[39m [32moptimization[39m [32mbehavior[39m [32msettings</li>[39m
 [32m *[39m       [32m<li>{@link[39m [32mDesugaringConfiguration}[39m [32m-[39m [32mdesugaring[39m [32mbehavior[39m [32msettings</li>[39m
 [32m *[39m       [32m<li>{@link[39m [32mThreadingConfiguration}[39m [32m-[39m [32mthreading[39m [32mand[39m [32mparallelism[39m [32msettings</li>[39m
 [32m *[39m       [32m<li>{@link[39m [32mApiLevelConfiguration}[39m [32m-[39m [32mAndroid[39m [32mAPI[39m [32mlevel[39m [32msettings</li>[39m
 [32m *[39m       [32m<li>{@link[39m [32mConsumerConfiguration}[39m [32m-[39m [32moutput[39m [32mconsumer[39m [32msettings</li>[39m
 [32m *[39m     [32m</ul>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m</dd>[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<dt><b>Open/Closed[39m [32mPrinciple[39m [32m(OCP)</b></dt>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<dd>New[39m [32mconfiguration[39m [32maspects[39m [32mcan[39m [32mbe[39m [32madded[39m [32mby[39m [32mcreating[39m [32mnew[39m [32minterfaces[39m
 [32m *[39m       [32mwithout[39m [32mmodifying[39m [32mexisting[39m [32mones.</dd>[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<dt><b>Liskov[39m [32mSubstitution[39m [32mPrinciple[39m [32m(LSP)</b></dt>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<dd>Any[39m [32mimplementation[39m [32mof[39m [32mthese[39m [32minterfaces[39m [32mcan[39m [32mbe[39m [32msubstituted[39m [32mwithout[39m
 [32m *[39m       [32mbreaking[39m [32mthe[39m [32mcompiler.</dd>[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<dt><b>Interface[39m [32mSegregation[39m [32mPrinciple[39m [32m(ISP)</b></dt>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<dd>Clients[39m [32mcan[39m [32mdepend[39m [32mon[39m [32mspecific[39m [32mconfiguration[39m [32minterfaces[39m [32mrather[39m [32mthan[39m
 [32m *[39m       [32ma[39m [32mmonolithic[39m [32mconfiguration[39m [32mclass.</dd>[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<dt><b>Dependency[39m [32mInversion[39m [32mPrinciple[39m [32m(DIP)</b></dt>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<dd>High-level[39m [32mmodules[39m [32mdepend[39m [32mon[39m [32mthese[39m [32mabstractions,[39m [32mnot[39m [32mconcrete[39m
 [32m *[39m       [32mimplementations[39m [32mlike[39m [32mInternalOptions.</dd>[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m</dl>[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m<h3>Usage[39m [32mPatterns</h3>[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m<h4>1.[39m [32mReducing[39m [32mCoupling</h4>[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m<pre>{@code[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m//[39m [32mBEFORE:[39m [32mTightly[39m [32mcoupled[39m [32mto[39m [32mInternalOptions[39m
 [32m *[39m [32mpublic[39m [32mclass[39m [32mOptimizer[39m [32m{[39m
 [32m *[39m     [32mprivate[39m [32mfinal[39m [32mInternalOptions[39m [32moptions;[39m
 [32m *[39m     [32mpublic[39m [32mboolean[39m [32mshouldOptimize()[39m [32m{[39m
 [32m *[39m         [32mreturn[39m [32moptions.isOptimizing();[39m
 [32m *[39m     [32m}[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m}[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m//[39m [32mAFTER:[39m [32mDepends[39m [32monly[39m [32mon[39m [32mrequired[39m [32mconfiguration[39m
 [32m *[39m [32mpublic[39m [32mclass[39m [32mOptimizer[39m [32m{[39m
 [32m *[39m     [32mprivate[39m [32mfinal[39m [32mOptimizationConfiguration[39m [32mconfig;[39m
 [32m *[39m     [32mpublic[39m [32mOptimizer(OptimizationConfiguration[39m [32mconfig)[39m [32m{[39m
 [32m *[39m         [32mthis.config[39m [32m=[39m [32mconfig;[39m
 [32m *[39m     [32m}[39m
 [32m *[39m     [32mpublic[39m [32mboolean[39m [32mshouldOptimize()[39m [32m{[39m
 [32m *[39m         [32mreturn[39m [32mconfig.isTreeShakingEnabled();[39m
 [32m *[39m     [32m}[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m}[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m}</pre>[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m<h4>2.[39m [32mImproving[39m [32mTestability</h4>[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m<pre>{@code[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m//[39m [32mEasy[39m [32mto[39m [32mcreate[39m [32mtest[39m [32mdoubles[39m
 [32m *[39m [32mOptimizationConfiguration[39m [32mtestConfig[39m [32m=[39m [32mnew[39m [32mOptimizationConfiguration()[39m [32m{[39m
 [32m *[39m     [32m@Override[39m [32mpublic[39m [32mboolean[39m [32misTreeShakingEnabled()[39m [32m{[39m [32mreturn[39m [32mtrue;[39m [32m}[39m
 [32m *[39m     [32m//[39m [32m...[39m [32mother[39m [32mmethods[39m [32mwith[39m [32mdefaults[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m};[39m
 [32m *[39m [32mOptimizer[39m [32moptimizer[39m [32m=[39m [32mnew[39m [32mOptimizer(testConfig);[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m}</pre>[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m<h3>Migration[39m [32mStrategy</h3>[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m<ol>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<li><b>Phase[39m [32m1</b>:[39m [32mInternalOptions[39m [32mimplements[39m [32mCompilerConfiguration</li>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<li><b>Phase[39m [32m2</b>:[39m [32mNew[39m [32mcode[39m [32muses[39m [32msub-interfaces[39m [32minstead[39m [32mof[39m [32mInternalOptions</li>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<li><b>Phase[39m [32m3</b>:[39m [32mExisting[39m [32mcode[39m [32mgradually[39m [32mmigrates[39m [32mto[39m [32minterfaces</li>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<li><b>Phase[39m [32m4</b>:[39m [32mInternalOptions[39m [32mbecomes[39m [32ma[39m [32mthin[39m [32mfacade[39m [32mor[39m [32mis[39m [32mremoved</li>[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m</ol>[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m@see[39m [32mCompilerConfiguration[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m@see[39m [32mCompilationConfiguration[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m@see[39m [32mOptimizationConfiguration[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m@see[39m [32mDesugaringConfiguration[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m@see[39m [32mThreadingConfiguration[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m@see[39m [32mApiLevelConfiguration[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m@see[39m [32mConsumerConfiguration[39m
 [32m */[39m
 [34mpackage[39m com.android.tools.r8.config;

[2m[38;5;239m╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
[0m Do you want to create [1mpackage-info.java[0m?
 [38;5;153m❯[39m [38;5;246m1.[39m [38;5;153mYes[39m
   [38;5;246m2.[39m Yes, allow all edits during this session [1m(shift+tab)[0m
   [38;5;246m3.[39m No

 [38;5;246mEsc[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mcancel[39m [38;5;246m·[39m [38;5;246mTab[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mamend[39m
